title: Light Creamy Australian Corn Wrap
description: A comforting Australian dish featuring creamed corn and grilled to perfection in a corn husk wrap, with a citrusy and snappy flavor profile. This dish is onion and garlic friendly free.
instructions: Preheat the yakimono grill to medium-high heat.
Soak the corn husks in water for 30 minutes to make them pliable.
In a bowl, mix together the creamed corn, unsalted butter, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Lay a corn husk flat and spoon about 1/2 cup of the corn mixture onto the center of the husk.
Sprinkle some grated cheddar cheese and chopped cilantro on top of the corn mixture.
Fold the sides of the husk over the filling and then roll the wrap up tightly.
Grill the wraps for 5-7 minutes on each side, or until the husk is lightly charred and the filling is heated through.
Serve the wraps hot and enjoy.
Garnish with additional cilantro and lemon wedges if desired.
